evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Optimizing the data estate for cost and performance; CI/CD checks; pipeline health
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour-focused: emphasis on optimization, testing (CI/CD), and reliability management.
evidence.domain_risk: Financial services (mobile money/payments); high domain risk due to regulatory requirements.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: mobile money platform in regulated markets (Kenya, Ghana, West Africa) with inherent financial/regulatory exposure.
evidence.collaboration_width: domain stakeholders; orchestration platforms (Dagster/Airflow implied partnerships)
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (dbt macros, Snowflake optimization), dimensional modeling at scale, established function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Creating dbt macros and CI/CD checks; Optimizing the data estate for cost and performance
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical practices (dbt macros, CI/CD, Snowflake optimization) named precisely.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on building platform, optimizing data estate, supporting internal analytics — not external commercial/product.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Technical ownership of infrastructure (dbt, Snowflake) but on-call responsibilities imply execution-level ops work alongside strategy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-infrastructure expected from the candidate.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Tool_listed: CI/CD and testing appear in tooling context without ownership verb.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate loss aversion: operational reliability is explicit (on-call) but not compliance/regulatory framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Optimizing the data estate for cost and performance
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: task is to optimize and scale existing systems, not build greenfield.
evidence.loss_aversion: Pipeline health with on-call responsibilities — preventing outages, not regulatory exposure.
evidence.work_arrangement: Location: Remote (must be based in talent hub countries)
